summary: Verified MUTCD road signs implementation and HERE Maps v8.140.0 routing parameters. All features working correctly: MUTCD-compliant speed limit signs (R2-1), Interstate shields (M1-1), US Route shields (M1-4), exit guide signs, MapControls auto-collapse during driving mode, Fuel Cost & HOS panels at bottom-right, NavigationHUD at top with turn instructions.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: server.ts lines 272-279 - New v8.140.0 params: vehicle[currentWeight], vehicle[emptyWeight], vehicle[tiresCount]
VERIFIED: utils/mutcdSigns.ts - MUTCD-compliant sign generators: interstateShield, usRouteShield, stateRouteShield, speedLimitSign, curveWarning, etc.
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 1198-1214 - placeSpeedLimitSigns uses speedLimitSign() from mutcdSigns.ts
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 1087-1157 - placeHighwayShields uses interstateShield(), usRouteShield(), stateRouteShield()
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 1160-1178 - placeExitSigns uses exitGuideSign() from mutcdSigns.ts
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 1245-1287 - placeCmvWarnings uses steepGradeWarning(), rolloverWarning(), windingRoadWarning()
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 1290-1346 - placeTruckWarnings uses lowClearanceWarning(), weightLimitSign(), tunnelWarning(), noHazmatSign(), noTrucksSign()
VERIFIED: MapControls.tsx line 36-38 - Auto-collapse on isDrivingMode via useEffect
VERIFIED: NavigationHUD.tsx line 86 - top-14 mobile fix for proper positioning

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: App at https://hud-customizer-5.preview.emergentagent.com. Features verified: 1) MUTCD road signs - speed limit signs (R2-1 format with white rectangle, SPEED LIMIT text, black number), Interstate shields (M1-1 blue shield with red top band), US Route shields (M1-4), exit guide signs (green with white text). 2) HERE Maps v8.140.0 params - vehicle[emptyWeight] (35% of gross), vehicle[currentWeight], vehicle[tiresCount] (18 for 5-axle). 3) MapControls auto-collapse during driving mode - only hamburger, zoom +/-, zoom level, and heading buttons visible when collapsed. 4) Fuel Cost & HOS panels at bottom-right (y=773-847, x=1718). 5) NavigationHUD at top (y=12) shows turn instruction. Test flow: Guest login -> Navigation tab -> search 'Houston TX' -> press Enter (auto-routes). IP geolocation fallback places user in Council Bluffs, Iowa.

mutcd_speed_limit_signs.details: 5 MUTCD R2-1 speed limit signs found on route. White rectangular format with 'SPEED LIMIT' text and black number (35 mph visible).

mutcd_interstate_shields.details: 24 highway shield markers found on route. Interstate shields use M1-1 format (blue shield with red top band, 'INTERSTATE' text).

mutcd_exit_signs.details: 10 exit guide signs found on route. Green rectangular format with white text.

here_v8_params.details: Route API includes vehicle[emptyWeight] (35% of gross), vehicle[currentWeight], vehicle[tiresCount] (default 18 for 5-axle).

map_controls_auto_collapse.details: During driving mode, collapsible controls (filter, overview, 2D, follow, compass) are hidden. Hamburger, zoom +/-, zoom level, and heading buttons remain visible.

hamburger_toggle.details: Hamburger toggle (data-testid='map-controls-toggle') expands collapsible controls when clicked.

fuel_cost_panel.details: Fuel Cost panel positioned at bottom-right (y=773, x=1719). Shows $486.90 for route.

hos_status_panel.details: HOS Status panel positioned at bottom-right (y=847, x=1718). Shows '11h 0m drive left'.

navigation_hud.details: NavigationHUD visible at top (y=12, x=16). Shows turn instruction 'W Broadway. Go for 1312 ft.'

arrival_hud.details: Arrival HUD at bottom shows speed (0), distance (899.1 mi), duration (13h 11m), ETA (5:56 PM).
